sentences: <ENT_044> <REF_038> uses the bounding box coordinates as object queries in the decoder and gradually updates them in every layer.
These box coordinates make training convergence faster by providing positional information and using the height and width values to update the positional attention map.
This type of object query provides better spatial information prior to the attention mechanism and provides a simple query formulation mechanism.
The structure of the original <ENT_008> after the addition of <ENT_044> <REF_038>, <ENT_033> <REF_024>, and <ENT_032> <REF_025>.
Here, the network is a simple <ENT_008> network, along with improvement indicated with small colored boxes.
The purple block indicates <ENT_044>, the dark green block indicates <ENT_033>, and light green box represents <ENT_032>.
